_comment: Drives tools/generate_images.py. `slug` becomes the output filename (assets/img/<type>/<slug>.webp). Recipe prompts are auto-built from `title`; category prompts from `subject`. Add an explicit `prompt` to any entry to override.

logo.prompt: A circular app-icon logo badge for a healthy gut-friendly eating brand, smooth fresh green gradient background, a simple clean white stylised leaf and plate symbol centered, modern minimalist flat design, soft shadow, crisp and balanced. No text, no words, no letters, no watermark.
